channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HILINFRA] Highway Infrastructure Ltd. Changes CIN from Unlisted to Listed on Stock Exchange
item.description:
Highway Infrastructure Ltd. has updated its listing status in MCA Master Data, changing its CIN from unlisted to listed, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company's MCA Master data and other relevant information can be accessed on the company's website. This update includes changes to the company's capital, last AGM date, and balance sheet date.

  • Highway Infrastructure Ltd. changes CIN from unlisted to listed
  • Updated listing status in MCA Master Data
  • Changes in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI
  • New relevant information available on the company's website
  • Adjustments to the company's capital, last AGM date, and balance sheet date

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Highway Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Punjab National Bank has announced changes in its senior management with effect from 2nd March 2026. The new Chairman is Shri Debasish Gangopadhyay, who holds a Master of Science degree and a diploma in Computer Management. He is also a Certified Associate of the Indian Institute of Bankers (CAIIB) and has over 25 years of experience in the bank. The bank requests all to take note of these changes.

  • Punjab National Bank announces changes in senior management
  • Shri Debasish Gangopadhyay appointed as the new Chairman
  • Gangopadhyay holds a Master of Science degree and a diploma in Computer Management
  • He is a Certified Associate of the Indian Institute of Bankers (CAIIB)
  • Gangopadhyay has over 25 years of experience in the bank

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ATISHAY] Atishay Ltd Empanelled by BSNL as Circle Level System Integrator in MP Telecom Circle
item.description:
Atishay Ltd has been empanelled by Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) as a Circle Level - System Integrator in the MP Telecom Circle. This empanelment allows the company to undertake marketing and selling of BSNL Data Services and be engaged in the supply, configuration, integration, and maintenance of customer end equipment including networking solutions such as LAN/WAN infrastructure for BSNL data service customers within the MP Telecom Circle. While this does not have an immediate material financial impact, it is expected to enhance future business opportunities in the telecom and data services segment.

  • Atishay Ltd empanelled by BSNL as Circle Level - System Integrator in MP Telecom Circle
  • Company to undertake marketing and selling of BSNL Data Services
  • Engaged in supply, configuration, integration, and maintenance of customer end equipment
  • Networking solutions such as LAN/WAN infrastructure for BSNL data service customers
  • Expected to enhance future business opportunities in the telecom and data services segment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atishay Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SIMBHALS] Simbhaoli Sugars Ltd Closes Crushing Operations for Sugar Season FY 2025-2026 at Unit-Brijnathpur
item.description:
Simbhaoli Sugars Limited has announced the closure of its crushing operations for the sugar season 2025-2026 at its Unit-Brijnathpur, located on the Hapur-Bulandshahar Road, behind the Hafizpur Police Check Post, in the village of Brijnathpur, Hapur, Uttar Pradesh. This information is provided pursuant to the Disclosure under Schedule III of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Simbhaoli Sugars Ltd has closed its crushing operations for the sugar season 2025-2026.
  • The closure is announced for the Brijnathpur unit located in Hapur, Uttar Pradesh.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Simbhaoli Sugars Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NEULANDLAB] Sad Demise of Dr. Christopher M Cimarusti, Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of Neuland Laboratories Ltd
item.description:
Neuland Laboratories Ltd has announced the demise of Dr. Christopher M Cimarusti, Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of the company. Dr. Cimarusti was associated with the Board of the Company since 2009 and has made significant contributions, particularly in the R&D function. The company expresses its deep sorrow and condolences to his family.

  • Dr. Christopher M Cimarusti, Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of Neuland Laboratories Ltd, has passed away on February 28, 2026.
  • Dr. Cimarusti was associated with the Board of the Company since 2009 and has made significant contributions, particularly in the R&D function.
  • The company expresses its deep sorrow and condolences to his family.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NEULAND LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COALINDIA] Coal India Ltd Announces SWMA E-auction Results for Feb'26 and Apr'25-Feb'26 (Cumulative)
item.description:
Coal India Ltd (CIL) has released the provisional results of the SWMA E-auction for CIL and its subsidiary companies for the month of February 2026 and the cumulative period from April 2025 to February 2026. The total quantity offered was 2034 lakh tonnes, out of which 10366 lakh tonnes were allocated. This information is provided as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015.

  • Coal India Ltd announces SWMA E-auction results for February 2026
  • Results for the cumulative period from April 2025 to February 2026 also released
  • Total quantity offered was 2034 lakh tonnes
  • Total quantity allocated was 10366 lakh tonnes
  • This information is provided as per SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COAL INDIA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [NECLIFE] Nectar Lifesciences Infuses INR 120 Crores as Inter-Corporate Loan to Proposed WOS Post Acquisition
item.description:
Nectar Lifesciences Limited has updated its disclosures regarding the infusion of an inter-corporate loan of up to INR 120 crores to its proposed wholly owned subsidiary, Avensis Exports Private Limited. This decision was made during the board meeting held on March 02, 2026. The loan agreement details will be shared with the stock exchanges after the definitive loan agreement with the proposed WOS is completed. The delay in providing these details was due to an administrative oversight and the company regrets the same, assuring commitment to furnishing all material information within the prescribed time limits in the future.

  • Nectar Lifesciences to infuse INR 120 crores as inter-corporate loan to Avensis Exports Private Limited
  • The decision was made during the board meeting held on March 02, 2026
  • Loan agreement details to be shared with stock exchanges post definitive loan agreement
  • The delay in providing details was due to an administrative oversight
  • Company reaffirms commitment to furnishing material information within prescribed time limits

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NECTAR LIFESCIENCES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Ltd Subsidiary Merged for Operational Efficiency
item.description:
Persistent Systems Ltd announced the merger of its step-down subsidiary, Persistent Telecom Solutions Inc., USA, into its wholly-owned subsidiary, Persistent Systems Inc., USA, effective from February 28, 2026. The merger aims to achieve entity rationalisation and operational efficiency within the group. The company received the Certificate of Merger issued by the Secretary of the State of Delaware on March 3, 2026 (IST).

  • Persistent Telecom Solutions Inc., USA, merged into Persistent Systems Inc., USA
  • Effective from February 28, 2026
  • Certificate of Merger issued by the Secretary of the State of Delaware on March 3, 2026 (IST)
  • Merger aims to achieve entity rationalisation and operational efficiency

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [GALADA] Galada Power & Telecommunication Ltd to Increase Authorised Capital and Amend Memorandum
item.description:
Galada Power & Telecommunication Ltd has announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for 27th March 2026. The agenda includes an increase in the company's Authorised Capital and necessary amendments to the Memorandum and Articles of Association. The company's Register of Members will be closed from 20th to 26th March 2026 for the purpose of the EGM.

  • Galada Power & Telecommunication Ltd is planning to increase its Authorised Capital
  • The company will also amend its Memorandum and Articles of Association
  • An Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) has been scheduled for 27th March 2026
  • The company's Register of Members will be closed from 20th to 26th March 2026 for the EGM

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GALADA POWER & TELECOMMUNICATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NATCOPHARM] Natco Pharma Launches Generic Version of Pomalyst® in U.S. Market with Estimated Sales of USD 3.2 Billion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Natco Pharma Limited, in partnership with Breckenridge Pharmaceutical, Inc, has announced the launch of Pomalidomide Capsules, a generic version of Pomalyst® by Celgene, in the U.S. market. The product, available in 1mg, 2mg, 3mg, and 4mg strengths, is indicated for the treatment of multiple myeloma and Kaposi sarcoma. It had estimated sales of USD 3.2 billion in the U.S. for 12 months ending Sep’25. Natco believes it has 180 days of shared exclusivity. The launch strengthens Natco’s oncology and specialty portfolio in the U.S. and underscores Breckenridge’s commitment to expanding its specialty generics portfolio.

  • Natco Pharma and Breckenridge Pharmaceutical announce launch of Pomalidomide Capsules, a generic version of Pomalyst®, in the U.S. market.
  • Pomalidomide Capsules are indicated for the treatment of multiple myeloma and Kaposi sarcoma.
  • The product is available in 1mg, 2mg, 3mg, and 4mg strengths and had estimated sales of USD 3.2 billion in the U.S. for 12 months ending Sep’25.
  • Natco believes it has 180 days of shared exclusivity.
  • Launch strengthens Natco’s oncology and specialty portfolio in the U.S. and underscores Breckenridge’s commitment to expanding its specialty generics portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATCO PHARMA LTD. | Category: New Launch
